positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    last_summer_olympic_games != tokyo).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    last_summer_olympic_games != usa).

cnf(u14,negated_conjecture,
    ~won_most_medals_in(usa,last_summer_olympic_games)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    tokyo != usa).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    won_most_medals_in(usa,tokyo)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define sporting_event(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define held_in(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    last_summer_olympic_games != usa).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    tokyo != usa).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    last_summer_olympic_games != tokyo).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define sporting_event(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define held_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define won_most_medals_in(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
